articles.title: Jacob Fatu on CRAZY WIN vs. Drew McIntyre at WRESTLEMANIA 42, becoming WWE STAR | Daniel Cormier
articles.description: Daniel Cormier was joined by WWE SUPERSTAR Jacob Fatu ahead of his WrestleMania 42 match with Drew McIntyre. Fatu talks about the struggle of going through the independent ranks before being signed to the WWE and how he gets emotional from just thinking about his journey. Fatu also shares how wrestling has changed his life, as well as talks about still feeling star struck when meeting WWE legends like Roman Reigns. articles.title: Colby Covington says CREATING “Chaos” Colby SAVED HIS CAREER | The Daniel Cormier Show
articles.description: Daniel Cormier is joined by Colby Covington, where he talks about making a CHANGE in his career to make himself more popular. Colby remembers creating Colby “Chaos” Covington by talking trash to any and all opponents in the UFC. Colby remembers beating the No. 6 fighter in the weight class, and getting NO love, and finding out that the UFC was going to cut him because they didn’t find him interesting. Colby knew he had to save his career, and decided to play the villain role, and he became one of the most polarizing fighters in the UFC. articles.title: Colby Covington accuses Jon Jones of CHEATING with testosterone use in college | Daniel Cormier
articles.description: Daniel Cormier is joined by Colby Covington where he talks about being roommates with Jon Jones in school at Iowa Central Community College. Colby talks about how he HATED living with Jon, and that he had insane mood swings because of the testosterone he was taking. Colby calls Jon a CHEATER, and says that DC is the natural champion because the only person who beat him was on steroids. All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms! articles.title: Daniel Cormier WARNS Arman Tsarukyan to not blow title shot + What Holloway told DC about McGregor
articles.description: Arman Tsarukyan got KICKED OFF his flight, and Max Holloway told DC he wants Conor McGregor, so Daniel Cormier IS BACK with his instant reaction to the biggest storylines in the UFC and MMA. DC warns Arman Tsarukyan to NOT MESS UP his title shot in the UFC, as many project he'll face the winner of the Justin Gaethje vs. Ilia Topuria championship fight at the White House. Arman was recently kicked off a flight for using his phone during takeoff, as this is yet another mishap in Tsarukyan's step towards a title. Cormier also shares that he had a conversation with Max Holloway recently, and that he's fully set on fighting Conor McGregor next after losing the BMF title fight to Charles Oliveira. Don't miss DC give his take on Max fighting Conor next, Arman's antics outside the octagon, and so much more! All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms! articles.title: Colby Covington claims he "DOMINATED" Jorge Masvidal in training before UFC 272 | Daniel Cormier
articles.description: In his debut on the Daniel Cormier Show, Colby Covington GOES IN ON Jorge Masvidal and gives insight on what it was like living with him back when they were friends. Covington says he dominated Jorge in training "easily" before they eventually became enemies and fought each other at UFC 272. Covington also reflects on his recent losses, including the short-notice fight vs. Joaquin Buckley, and what's next for him in the UFC.
